description: This file defines a Config class used for managing configuration objects within the Bootstrap framework. It includes methods for retrieving default configurations, merging configurations with data attributes, and type checking configuration options. It also exports the Config class as the default export.

classes.name: Config
classes.description: A class providing utilities for managing component configurations, including default values, merging, and type validation.

methods.name: Default
methods.description: Getter that returns the default configuration object.

methods.name: DefaultType
methods.description: Getter that returns the default types for configuration options.

methods.name: NAME
methods.description: Getter that should be overridden to return the component's name; throws an error if not implemented.

methods.name: _getConfig
methods.description: Retrieves and processes the configuration object, merging defaults and data attributes, then performs type checking.

methods.name: _configAfterMerge
methods.description: Hook method that can be overridden to modify the configuration after merging.

methods.name: _mergeConfigObj
methods.description: Merges default configuration, data attributes, and provided config into a single configuration object.

methods.name: _typeCheckConfig
methods.description: Validates the types of configuration options against expected types, throwing an error if mismatched.
